records.ety: [Possibly contr. fr. godfather; but prob. fr. gramfer for grandfather. Cf. Gammer.]

defs: An old fellow; an aged rustic.
quotes: Go to each gaffer and each goody.
notes: ☞ Gaffer was originally a respectful title, now degenerated into a term of familiarity or contempt when addressed to an aged man in humble life.

defs: A foreman or overseer of a gang of laborers.
